outline.caption: Build productive working relationships with your State Approving Agency. Streamline VA certifications, enhance compliance, and support student veterans with VASCO Assistant Pro. Get started with a pre-launch offer. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Support Student Veterans,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw attention. A stronger headline might improve engagement.
